title: 1.8.9 Forge NBT Viewer
description: View and copy color-coded ItemStack NBT data.
body:
## Information:

This mod allows you to view and copy ItemStack NBT data in game.

## Usage:

Hover over any item to view its NBT tooltip below the vanilla preview.

Use `CTRL+C` while hovering over tooltips to copy the NBT data to your clipboard.

## Tips:

Use with Sk1er's [Scrollable Tooltips](https://sk1er.club/mods/text_overflow_scroll) mod if the tooltip text overflows off your screen.
